scripts.dev: concurrently -n shared,contracts,clip-scoring,cutlist,subtitles,reframe,emoji-suggester,database,storage,social,web,api,worker -c blue,cyan,white,gray,green,magenta,yellow,red,blackBright,blueBright,cyanBright,whiteBright,gray "pnpm --filter @speedora/shared dev" "pnpm --filter @speedora/contracts dev" "pnpm --filter @speedora/clip-scoring dev" "pnpm --filter @speedora/cutlist dev" "pnpm --filter @speedora/subtitles dev" "pnpm --filter @speedora/reframe dev" "pnpm --filter @speedora/emoji-suggester dev" "pnpm --filter @speedora/database dev" "pnpm --filter @speedora/storage dev" "pnpm --filter @speedora/social dev" "pnpm --filter @speedora/web dev" "pnpm --filter @speedora/api start:dev" "pnpm --filter @speedora/worker dev"
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @speedora/shared build && pnpm --filter @speedora/contracts build && pnpm --filter @speedora/clip-scoring build && pnpm --filter @speedora/cutlist build && pnpm --filter @speedora/subtitles build && pnpm --filter @speedora/reframe build && pnpm --filter @speedora/emoji-suggester build && pnpm --filter @speedora/database build && pnpm --filter @speedora/storage build && pnpm --filter @speedora/social build && pnpm --filter @speedora/web build && pnpm --filter @speedora/api build && pnpm --filter @speedora/worker build
